subparts.text: Find the N point DFT for x=an for 0<a<1

An analog filter has the following transfer function H=1/s Using Bilinear transform technique, determine the transfer function of the digital filter H
Find the response of FIR filter with impulse response h={1,2,4} to the input sequence x={1,2} using circular convolution.

Find the inverse DFT of the sequence X={6,-2+2j,-2,-2-2j} using efficient computation algorithm.

Realise the discrete system y =-0.1y+0.2y+3x+3.6x+0.6x using Cascade forms Parallel forms.
A certain discrete time LTI filter has the following data Poles are at 0.2 and 0.6 Zeros are at -0.4 and origin Gain of the filter is 5 Show direct form-II and cascade form realization.
